items.title: Salesforce.com (CRM) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
items.description: In the most recent trading session, Salesforce.com (CRM) closed at $267.22, indicating a +1.38% shift from the previous trading day.

items.title: ServiceNow raises annual subscription revenue forecast on AI-driven tools demand
items.description: (Reuters) -ServiceNow raised its annual subscription revenue forecast on Wednesday, signaling robust demand for its artificial intelligence-enabled software designed to automate digital operations and sending its shares up more than 7% in extended trading.  Businesses are widely adopting cloud-based enterprise solutions from vendors including ServiceNow, Salesforce and Freshworks to streamline operations and boost productivity amid the ongoing AI boom.  ServiceNow projected its third-quarter subscription revenue above Wall Street estimates, despite economic uncertainty due to changing U.S. trade policies and Trump administration's cost-cutting measures that led to contract cancellations and delays.
